org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml

Interface GMLConstants

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractGMLReader, GMLParser, GMLReader, GMLReader1, GMLReader2, GMLWriter

    public interface GMLConstants
    Constants for the GML format.

    Graph Modelling Language (GML) is a hierarchical ASCII-based file format for describing graphs. It has been also named Graph Meta Language.

    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Graph_Modelling_Language"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io
